title: [codereview-pass2-security] Gateway lacks TX queue integration and RPL SRH insertion for downward traffic
description: P1: mesh-to-mesh packets require SourceRoutingHeader insertion per RFC6554 to prevent blackholing in non-storing RPL. No SCHC recompress after SRH (packet size changes). No TX queue (lichen_core::tx_queue or SlipFramer.queue). Potential buffer overflow or drop without queue. codereview-tagged. See lichen-rpl::routing::SourceRoutingHeader and lichen-core/src/tx_queue.rs. Discovered-from: project-LICHEN-lug0
close_reason: Decomposed into subtasks project-LICHEN-hwup.1 (SRH insertion), .2 (SCHC recompress after SRH), .3 (TX queue integration in gateway)
